auth.label: Access Token
auth.description: Pushbullet access token sent with the Access-Token header. Find it in your Pushbullet Account Settings.

actions.name: create_chat
actions.description: Create a Pushbullet chat with another user by email address.

email.description: Email address for the chat participant.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a Pushbullet chat.

outputSchema.description: Pushbullet object returned by the API with upstream fields preserved.

actions.name: create_device
actions.description: Create a new Pushbullet device for the current user.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a device.

outputSchema.description: Pushbullet object returned by the API with upstream fields preserved.

actions.name: create_push
actions.description: Send a Pushbullet note, link, file, or list push to the current user or a selected target.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a Pushbullet push.

outputSchema.description: Pushbullet object returned by the API with upstream fields preserved.

actions.name: delete_all_pushes
actions.description: Delete all Pushbullet pushes for the current account.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting all Pushbullet pushes.

deleted.description: Whether the delete request completed successfully.

outputSchema.description: Response returned after deleting a Pushbullet resource.

actions.name: delete_chat
actions.description: Delete one Pushbullet chat by identifier.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting a Pushbullet chat.

deleted.description: Whether the delete request completed successfully.

outputSchema.description: Response returned after deleting a Pushbullet resource.

actions.name: delete_device
actions.description: Delete one Pushbullet device by identifier.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting a Pushbullet device.

deleted.description: Whether the delete request completed successfully.

outputSchema.description: Response returned after deleting a Pushbullet resource.

actions.name: delete_push
actions.description: Delete one Pushbullet push by identifier.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting a Pushbullet push.

deleted.description: Whether the delete request completed successfully.

outputSchema.description: Response returned after deleting a Pushbullet resource.

actions.name: get_current_user
actions.description: Get the currently authenticated Pushbullet user profile.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for getting the current user.

outputSchema.description: Pushbullet object returned by the API with upstream fields preserved.

actions.name: list_chats
actions.description: List Pushbullet chats for the current account.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Pushbullet chats.

items.description: Pushbullet object returned by the API with upstream fields preserved.

outputSchema.description: Response returned when listing Pushbullet chats.

actions.name: list_devices
actions.description: List all registered devices for the current Pushbullet user.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Pushbullet devices.

items.description: Pushbullet object returned by the API with upstream fields preserved.

devices.description: Devices ordered with most recently modified first.

outputSchema.description: Response returned when listing Pushbullet devices.

actions.name: list_pushes
actions.description: List Pushbullet pushes with optional active, modified-after, and cursor filters.

active.description: When true, only return active pushes.

modified_after.description: Only return pushes modified after this Unix timestamp.

cursor.description: Cursor returned by a previous list_pushes response.

limit.description: Maximum number of pushes to return, up to 500.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Pushbullet pushes.

items.description: Pushbullet object returned by the API with upstream fields preserved.

pushes.description: Pushes ordered with most recently modified first.

cursor.description: Cursor for fetching the next page of pushes.

outputSchema.description: Response returned when listing Pushbullet pushes.

actions.name: update_chat
actions.description: Update an existing Pushbullet chat by identifier.

muted.description: Whether the chat should be muted.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for updating a Pushbullet chat.

outputSchema.description: Pushbullet object returned by the API with upstream fields preserved.

actions.name: update_device
actions.description: Update metadata for an existing Pushbullet device.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for updating a Pushbullet device.

outputSchema.description: Pushbullet object returned by the API with upstream fields preserved.

actions.name: update_push
actions.description: Update an existing Pushbullet push by identifier.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for updating a Pushbullet push.

outputSchema.description: Pushbullet object returned by the API with upstream fields preserved.
